title: athlete-enrollment — retention windows
description: Active + confirmed + waitlisted enrollments never expire. Completed / withdrawn / expelled / expired enrollments retain 7 years post terminal transition (season-history + membership-record retention for federation compliance).
compliance_regimes_referenced: gdpr Art. 17 (retention exception for regulatory records)

retention.entity: AthleteEnrollment — active / confirmed / waitlisted / submitted / payment_pending / consent_pending

purge.trigger: > 7 years past completed_at + no downstream references

purge.notes: Retention aligned with anti-discrimination audit — federation regulators may inspect multi-year disciplinary trails.
Expired enrollments retain shorter than terminal ones — the athlete never joined a team; no season-history exists.

cross_reference: TenantErased cascades hard-delete of every enrollment. Audit rows survive.
Athlete hard-delete cascades enrollments via RESTRICT — athlete must transition all enrollments to terminal states first, then archive.
